steps.title: Identify the right triangle and apply Pythagorean theorem
steps.content:
Point A is the apex, O is the center of the base, and B is on the base circumference. These form a right triangle with the right angle at O (the height is perpendicular to the base).

In this triangle:
  • Height: $AO = 42$ cm
  • Hypotenuse: $AB = 84$ cm
  • Radius: $OB = r$ (unknown)

By the Pythagorean theorem:
$$42^2 + r^2 = 84^2$$
$$1764 + r^2 = 7056$$
$$r^2 = 5292$$

steps.title: Apply the cone volume formula
steps.content:
Substitute $r^2 = 5292$ and $h = 42$ into the cone volume formula:
$$\frac{1}{3}\pi (5292)(42) = \frac{1}{3}\pi \cdot 222264 = \frac{222264\pi}{3} = 74088\pi$$
Since the volume is $k\pi$ cubic centimeters, $k = 74088$.
